# activeOperationalDataSet

**Instance Property**

The essential operational parameters for the Thread network.

## Declaration

```swift
var activeOperationalDataSet: Data? { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework parses this property, then extracts and sets [doc://com.apple.ThreadNetwork/documentation/ThreadNetwork/THCredentials/channel], [doc://com.apple.ThreadNetwork/documentation/ThreadNetwork/THCredentials/extendedPANID], [doc://com.apple.ThreadNetwork/documentation/ThreadNetwork/THCredentials/networkKey], [doc://com.apple.ThreadNetwork/documentation/ThreadNetwork/THCredentials/networkName], [doc://com.apple.ThreadNetwork/documentation/ThreadNetwork/THCredentials/panID], and [doc://com.apple.ThreadNetwork/documentation/ThreadNetwork/THCredentials/pskc] when you call [doc://com.apple.ThreadNetwork/documentation/ThreadNetwork/THClient/storeCredentials(forBorderAgent:activeOperationalDataSet:completion:)].

## Getting the Thread Parameters

- **borderAgentID**: The identifier of an active Thread network Border Agent.
- **channel**: The Thread network radio channel.
- **extendedPANID**: The Thread network extended PAN identifier.
- **networkKey**: The Thread network key.
- **networkName**: The Thread network name.
- **panID**: The Thread network PAN identifier.
- **pskc**: The Thread network pre-shared key (PSKC) for the Commissioner.
